title: Oil gains as length Middle East conflict looms
section_path: Oil gains as length Middle East conflict looms
section_path_text: Oil gains as length Middle East conflict looms
summary:
Main
Energy markets pushed higher despite plans to release emergency supplies of oil. Precious metal prices declined amid inflationary concerns. Industrial metals prices were mixed amid supply concerns.

children.title: Main
children.summary: Energy markets pushed higher despite plans to release emergency supplies of oil. Precious metal prices declined amid inflationary concerns.

children.title: Market Commentary
children.summary: Crude oil prices pushed higher as President Trump increased pressure on Iran. He warned that the US could strike even more targets in Iran "if we want".

children.title: Chart of the Day
children.summary: Exports from key oil producers in the Middle East are drying up quickly. The four biggest suppliers have seen their exports fall to 7.6mb/d in the week ending 12 March.
